## Objective
_What major capability does this epic deliver to the product?_

## Requirements Coverage
- **FRs covered:** <!-- e.g. FR08–FR19 -->
- **NFRs covered:** <!-- e.g. NFR01, NFR08 -->
- **ARs covered:** <!-- e.g. AR10–AR16 -->

## Included Stories
- [ ] Story N.0 — 
- [ ] Story N.1 —

## ADRs Required Before Implementation
- [ ] ADR-XXX — _Decision name_

## Completion Criteria
- [ ] All stories completed and merged to `main`
- [ ] All required ADRs documented in `docs/adr/`
- [ ] CI green on `main` after last merge
- [ ] Feature demonstrable in staging environment
- [ ] No open security or RGPD concerns

## Architecture Notes
_Cross-cutting concerns, integration points, or links to relevant ADRs and architecture decisions._
